case_title: DONNISHA HARRELL (GUARDIAN) et al VS. SUNNY AUTO BODY INC.

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SUNNY AUTO BODY INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-04-2013 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SUNNY AUTO BODY INC.
ORDER "GRANTED" ON PETITION OF MINOR PLAINTIFF,JAYLYN SAGOTE,APPOINTMENT OF GUARDIAN AD LITEM, SIGNED BY JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL.

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARRELL (GUARDIAN), DONNISHA (PLAINTIFF & GUARDIAN AD LITEM ) SAGOTE (MINOR), JAYLYN (MINOR & PLAINTIFF) ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-13-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SUNNY AUTO BODY INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-04-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-04-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY DENNY CHEN--MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
